name: Maintenance Gallery
description: Narrow service passages weave between exposed pipes, crystalline conduits, and humming
mechanisms hidden behind walls never meant for public eyes. Small articulated machines tirelessly
inspect joints, polish fittings, and replace worn components without acknowledging your presence.
None appear aware that the civilization they serve vanished ages ago.
Their work never ended.TODO: AI Text

criticalSuccess.text: The barrel goes over easily — and its false bottom gives way, scattering coin across the flagstones.

success.text: The barrel grinds aside. A few coins roll loose from beneath it.

failure.text: The barrel refuses to budge, and you nearly wrench your back trying.
